scope: Ad-hoc gate registration without central registry or composition tracing
corrected_assertion: Phase 0.2.5 Gate Registry + Composition Tracer ships. Six gates now register declaratively via gateRegistry.register({name, scope, priority, fn}): kc-bearish-blocker, chopday-signal-floor, chopday-aletheia-floor, sitout-auto-engage, kc-spot-no-shorting, balance-check. Each gate evaluation produces a structured GateDecision (pass | reject | exempt) that the composition tracer aggregates per proposal. Cascading rejections across multiple gates are now first-class observable — a proposal rejected by 3 gates emits 3 GateDecision rows for forensic accounting. 10h lockdown window during cutover where no new gates can register; existing 6 gates re-register on orchestrator boot. This is the prerequisite for re-enabling sit-out auto-engage (which depends on accurate cascading-rejection accounting per amendment #5).
source: May-10 amendment-shaped event #6 + spec doc Phase 0.2.5 Gate Registry Composition Tracer
